en.text: (Aramaic) or ; (Aramaic), corresponding to H5710 {to advance, i.e. pass on or continue; causatively, to remove; specifically, to bedeck (i.e. bring an ornament upon)}

senses.gloss_en: (Aramaic) or ; (Aramaic), corresponding to H5710 {to advance, i.e. pass on or continue; causatively, to remove; specifically, to bedeck (i.e. bring an ornament upon)}
